category_sources: Official README describes moodle-dl as a console application for downloading files from Moodle courses for study routines.
source_facts.description says moodle-dl downloads course content from Moodle.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is moodle-dl; official repository README title uses Moodle-DL.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides setup and usage; README also points to the official project wiki for additional settings.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for C0D3D3V/Moodle-DL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions Moodle course content downloads; official README documents Moodle course file downloads, notifications, and CLI setup.
